caption: A city street is lined with multi-story tan buildings and leafless trees, with several cars parked along the curb and others driving through the intersection. A grey pickup truck is the primary focus, moving forward through the center of the road from the foreground toward the background. As the scene progresses, the truck advances further into the intersection, passing a row of parked vehicles including a grey sedan, a silver sedan, and a white car. Further down the street, other vehicles are visible, including a dark grey car and a white truck. A tall black utility pole stands on the left side of the road near the parked cars. The lighting is bright and clear, suggesting a sunny day, and there are no visible people, on-screen text, or logos throughout the sequence.
